des: Brent Rooker grounds into a double play, shortstop Mauricio Dubón to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Tyler Soderstrom out at 2nd. Brent Rooker out at 1st.
Tyler Soderstrom singles on a fly ball to center fielder Michael Harris II. Shea Langeliers to 2nd.
Shea Langeliers reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Mauricio Dubón.
Nick Kurtz grounds out, pitcher Robert Suarez to first baseman Matt Olson.
Salvador Perez grounds out, second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson.
Lane Thomas singles on a line drive to right fielder Ronald Acuña Jr. Bobby Witt Jr. to 2nd.
Bobby Witt Jr. singles on a line drive to left fielder Eli White.
Maikel Garcia called out on strikes.
Carter Jensen grounds out, second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson.
